input_text: The letter was written in June. Mary's leg is clean. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. The tree was cut by the farmer. The street is in Tallinn. "Riga is not in America. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Sue is a true patriot. The book was read by Sara. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. The bike is small. Americans can not disappear. The mouse was chased by the cat. John travelled to the bathroom. A stone wall collapsed. An elephant was strong. The man carrying a bag waved. Estonia contains Tartu. The teacher showed the students the map. A chocolate cake fell. Tom opened the door and the window. A village road was narrow. A flower was white. Greg is a bear. The rain continued. Mr Dursley is an American. Paul ate a sandwich and Bill a salad. Winona is a sheep. Mike or Mickey are not female. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Penguins live in the water. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The toy of the child was broken. Mr Dursley can disappear?
